title: stravadium racemosum
intro: Stravadium racemosum, also known as the Strawberry Tree or Strawberry Guava, is a plant species belonging to the Myrtaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stravadium racemosum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit anticancer properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and fruits are also used in various culinary and cosmetic applications.
